employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Manage your employees' KPIs and performance metrics. You can have up to {{maxFreeEmployees}} employees.

new.title: New Employee
new.description: Add a new employee to manage their KPIs and performance.

roles.title: Employee Roles
roles.description: Define roles for your employees to categorize their responsibilities.

details.title: Employee Details
details.description: View and edit the details of your employee, including their role, performance metrics, and evaluation history.

table.label: Label
table.title: Evaluation Criterias
table.description: Manage the criteria used to evaluate employee performance. You can create multiple criteria for comprehensive evaluations.

description.title: Evaluation Criteria Description
description.description: Define the criteria for evaluating employee performance. You can create multiple criteria for comprehensive evaluations.

label.title: Evaluation Criteria Label
label.description: The label for the evaluation criteria, which will be used to assess employee performance.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: The weight of the evaluation criteria, which determines its importance in the overall performance assessment.

new.title: New Criteria
new.description: Create a new evaluation criteria to assess employee performance.

select.description: Select an evaluation template to use for employee performance reviews.

new.title: New Template
new.description: Create a new evaluation template to use for employee performance reviews.

new.title: New Role
new.description: Create a new role to assign specific responsibilities to your employees.

sign_in.title: Sign In
sign_in.description: Access your account to manage your employees KPI and performance.
sign_in.failed: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

sign_up.title: Sign Up
sign_up.description: Create a new account to start managing your employees KPI and performance.
sign_up.failed: An account with this email already exists. Please try a different email.

image.drop_click: Drag and drop an image or click to browse
image.only: Only *.jpeg and *.png images will be accepted
